languages.text: "Готовься, Эоганн, нас ждет тяжелая битва — это неопровержимый факт".
"Prepare yourself, Eogunn. A difficult battle lies ahead — this is an incontrovertible fact."
languages.original_text: "Готовься, Эоганн, нас ждет тяжелая битва — это неопровержимый факт".

traits.locale_text: "Prepare yourself, Eogunn. A difficult battle lies ahead — this is an incontrovertible fact."
"Prepare yourself, Eogunn. A difficult battle lies ahead — this is an incontrovertible fact."
"Prepare yourself, Eogunn. A difficult battle lies ahead — this is an incontrovertible fact."

languages.text: «Prepárese, Eogunn. Nos espera una batalla difícil. Es un hecho irrefutable».
languages.original_text: "Prepare yourself, Eogunn. A difficult battle lies ahead — this is an incontrovertible fact."

traits.locale_text: «Prepárese, Eogunn. Nos espera una batalla difícil. Es un hecho irrefutable».

languages.text: 「覚悟しておけ、エオガン。困難な戦いが待ち受けている――これは議論の余地のない事実だ」
languages.original_text: "Prepare yourself, Eogunn. A difficult battle lies ahead — this is an incontrovertible fact."

traits.locale_text: 「覚悟しておけ、エオガン。困難な戦いが待ち受けている――これは議論の余地のない事実だ」

languages.text: “做好准备，伊奥贡。前方将有一场恶战——这一点毋庸置疑。”
languages.original_text: "Prepare yourself, Eogunn. A difficult battle lies ahead — this is an incontrovertible fact."

traits.locale_text: “做好准备，伊奥贡。前方将有一场恶战——这一点毋庸置疑。”

languages.text: "Macht Euch bereit, Eogunn. Vor uns liegt eine schwierige Schlacht ... das ist eine unumstößliche Tatsache."
languages.original_text: "Prepare yourself, Eogunn. A difficult battle lies ahead — this is an incontrovertible fact."

traits.locale_text: "Macht Euch bereit, Eogunn. Vor uns liegt eine schwierige Schlacht ... das ist eine unumstößliche Tatsache."

languages.text: « Préparez-vous, Eogunn. Un combat difficile nous attend... il s'agit là d'un fait indéniable. »
languages.original_text: "Prepare yourself, Eogunn. A difficult battle lies ahead — this is an incontrovertible fact."

traits.locale_text: « Préparez-vous, Eogunn. Un combat difficile nous attend... il s'agit là d'un fait indéniable. »

languages.text: "Kendini hazırla Eogunn. Önümüzde zorlu bir savaş var. Bu yadsınamaz bir gerçek."
languages.original_text: "Prepare yourself, Eogunn. A difficult battle lies ahead — this is an incontrovertible fact."

traits.locale_text: "Kendini hazırla Eogunn. Önümüzde zorlu bir savaş var. Bu yadsınamaz bir gerçek."
